raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas notikē ta/ itt ka
tas Deewa Wihrs bij us to Keh-
nizu runnajs un fazzījs: Rihtu
ap fcho Laiku maksahs weens
Puhrs Kiweechu-Miltu weenu
Sihkeli/ un diwi Puhrt Mee-
schu weenu Sihkeli eeksch Sa-
marijas Wahrtim /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Wirfneeks bij tam
Deewa Wihran atbildejs un faz-
zijs: Rangi/ jepchu tas KUNGS
Lohgus eeksch Debbestin padar-
ritu/ ka warretu schi Leeta no-
tikt? Un tas bij fazzījs: Rau-
gi/ tu redsefi to ar tawahm Az-
zim/ un no ta ne ehdīsi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta patt tas winnam
notikē / jo tee Laudis faminne
wixnu eeksch Wahrtim / ka tas
nomirre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sweschtneezi fur warredam
nist/ jo tas KUNGS irr ween
Badnu aizinajs/ kas septimu
Gaddus tai Seimmē nahks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zebhahs ta Seewa/ u
darrija pehz ta Deewa Wihr
Wahrdn/ un noguhje ar faw
Saimi/ un mitte par Swesch
neezt Wilistern Semmē septimu
Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee septini Gadd
bija pagahjuschī/ nahze ta See
wa atpakkat no Wilistern Sem-
mes/ un tsgahje to Kehnizu pee-
fankt par fawn Nammu/ un pa-
fawn Tihrumu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch runnaj
ar Geasju ta Deewa Wihra Pu-
fi/ un fazzīja: Teiz man jel-
wiffas leelas Leetas/ ko Elisus ir
darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad uu tas tam Kehnisan
isteize/ ka tas weenu Nomtrru
schu bij dshwu darrijs/ Rangi-
tad perfauze ta Seewa/ kurra-
Dehlu wixsch bij dshwu darrijs,
to Kehnizu fawa Namma uu
fawa Tihruma pehz. Un Gea-
sus fazzīja: Mans Kungs keh-
nisch/ fchi trr ta Seewa/ un fchi-
irr winnas Dehls/ ko Elisus ir
dshwu darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad waizaja tas Kehniasch
to Seewu/ un ta stahstija wi-
nam to/ un tas Kehnisch dew-
tai weenu Kambar-Junkuri/faz-
zidams: Lat winnat atdohd wi-
fu/ kas winnat peederreja/
i
wiffus Tihruma Auglus/ uu
tahs Decnas/ kad winna t
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
